series.description: A single walk, photographed in order. One shoot, one place — the sequence as it unfolded.
series.evergreen_note: A named route through a place is a thing people look for.
series.refill_note: Each Routes-mode shoot produces one entry.

series.description: A museum, a concert, a festival — one shoot kept whole, the venue as it was walked through.
series.evergreen_note: Indoor venues and events as complete sequences.
series.refill_note: Each Visits-mode shoot produces one entry.

series.description: Recurring subjects revisited across many shoots — a tree, a bridge, a stretch of canal.
series.evergreen_note: The same subject returning in different seasons and light.
series.refill_note: Cross-shoot selection; any shoot can contribute.

series.description: Themed sequences cut across shoots — not one walk but one idea, assembled from many mornings.
series.evergreen_note: Editorially coherent sets that work together.
series.refill_note: Cross-shoot curation; entries grow as the idea accumulates.

series.description: A city or region as subject — Amsterdam, Maastricht, the North Sea coast — drawn from any shoot there.
series.evergreen_note: Place-led discovery: someone searching a city finds a body of work.
series.refill_note: Every shoot in a city extends it.
